Luxury hotel interior setting for ProLuxe Travel

Private travel. London.

We plan trips and host the people we know.

After 20 years in this work, the General Manager already knows your name when you walk in. That is most of them.

Get in touch See what we do

Who we are

20 years on the floor.

We started ProLuxe because the best trips are the ones where the hotel already knows you are coming. Not because someone called ahead. Because we did, and we have done this long enough that most of them know us.

Some clients come to us as families. Some as couples. Some bring their whole team. Whatever you have in mind, we will point you in the right direction.

Work with us →

What we do

Our services

01

Private Stays

A villa where the chef cooks dinner on the terrace. A suite at a hotel that pretends to be sold out. We find the room and sort everything before you get there.

Families, couples, small groups. We handle the detail so you do not have to think about it.

02

Venue Sourcing

Country houses, private estates, city hotels. UK and internationally.

We know which rooms work, which do not, and which only look the part.

03

Accommodation Sourcing

A place you have never heard of. A place you visit every year. The single trip that has to land.

Direct hotel relationships, no middleman.

Get in touch

Write to us.

Tell us what you have in mind. We will take it from there.
